OverHistory.NewCommentry: Eshan Malinga to Mitchell Marsh Wicket
OverHistory.Commentry: Eshan Malinga bowling to Mitchell Marsh, short of good length ball, pitching outside off stump, Mitchell Marsh plays an aggressive pull shot on the front foot WICKET Mitchell Marsh c Nitish Kumar Reddy b Eshan Malinga (Lucknow Super Giants 37 Runs for 1 wickets) towards Deep Mid-Wicket
OverHistory.UPDCommentry:
Impact straight up from Malinga!, Eshan Malinga bowling to Mitchell Marsh, short of good length ball, pitching outside off stump, Mitchell Marsh goes for a pull, he gets this a bit high on the bat, does not find the distance as the ball goes straight to Nitish Kumar Reddy at mid-wicket who takes a good catch! SRH camp are just elated! 

WICKET Mitchell Marsh c Nitish Kumar Reddy b Eshan Malinga (Lucknow Super Giants 37 Runs for 1 wickets)

OverHistory.UPDCommentry: Just Pose for the camera!, Jaydev Unadkat bowling to Aiden Markram, full toss ball, on leg stump, Aiden Markram times the drive straight down the ground for a boundary! Presents the full face of the bat beautifully and finds the ropes!

OverHistory.UPDCommentry:
50 on the board at the end of the powerplay for LSG!, Jaydev Unadkat bowling to Aiden Markram, short length ball, pitching outside off stump, Aiden Markram pulls this handsomely over square leg; the fielder at the deep watches this sail over. That's a thunderous connection from Markram!

OverHistory.NewCommentry: Shivang Kumar to Aiden Markram Wicket
OverHistory.Commentry: Shivang Kumar bowling to Aiden Markram, full length ball, pitching outside off stump, Aiden Markram plays an aggressive lofted off drive on the front foot WICKET Aiden Markram c Liam Livingstone b Shivang Kumar (Lucknow Super Giants 77 Runs for 2 wickets) towards Long-Off
OverHistory.UPDCommentry:
The Young Man Reaps reward finally for all the hard work! Gets rid of the dangerous Markram as SRH come back to the contest!, Shivang Kumar tosses this up on full wide of the off-stumps, Markram goes for the loft away from his reach, gets it in the outside part of the bat as there was not enough connection! Livinstone at long-off completes the catch near the ropes! What a way to get your maiden TATA IPL wicket!

WICKET Aiden Markram c Liam Livingstone b Shivang Kumar (Lucknow Super Giants 77 Runs for 2 wickets)

OverHistory.NewCommentry: Harsh Dubey to Ayush Badoni Wicket
OverHistory.Commentry: Harsh Dubey bowling to Ayush Badoni, yorker ball, pitching outside off stump, Ayush Badoni steps down and plays an aggressive cover drive WICKET  Ayush Badoni st Ishan Kishan b Harsh Dubey (Lucknow Super Giants 102 Runs for 3 wickets)
OverHistory.UPDCommentry:
Is there a twist in the tale?, Brilliant stuff from Harsh Dubey as he nails the yorker to perfection, saw Badoni coming down the charge, he fired this wide and out of his reach as the ball beats his attempted loft. Kishan, behind the stumps, was quick enough to collect the ball and whip off the bails! Is that the wicket they needed? 

WICKET Ayush Badoni st Ishan Kishan b Harsh Dubey (Lucknow Super Giants 102 Runs for 3 wickets)

OverHistory.NewCommentry: Shivang Kumar to Nicholas Pooran Wicket
OverHistory.Commentry: Shivang Kumar bowling to Nicholas Pooran, full length ball, pitching on leg stump, Nicholas Pooran plays a sweep shot WICKET Nicholas Pooran run out Ishan Kishan (Lucknow Super Giants 105 Runs for 4 wickets) towards Wicket Keeper
OverHistory.UPDCommentry:
Wickets in quick succession as the game is poised beautifully now! Shivang Kumar bowling to Nicholas Pooran, full length ball, pitching on leg stump, Nicholas Pooran gets on his knee but does not get hold on the sweep shot as he loses the balance, Kishan behind was in the right place as he collects the ball on the bounce, Pooran did not know what was happening and where the ball was- he comes out of the crease and was short of the crease when the bails were dislodged! 

WICKET Nicholas Pooran run out Ishan Kishan (Lucknow Super Giants 105 Runs for 4 wickets)
